zh-CN.title: 保存报告
zh-CN.body: 把这份结果保存下来，方便你以后对比复测变化。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是免费留存动作，不改变报告结论。
zh-CN.microcopy: 这是免费留存动作，不改变报告结论。

en.title: Save report
en.body: Keep this result so you can compare it with a later retest.
en.do_not_overread: This is a free retention action and does not change the report result.
en.microcopy: This is a free retention action and does not change the report result.

zh-CN.title: 邮件找回
zh-CN.body: 把结果发送到你的邮箱，方便之后回来继续阅读。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是免费留存动作，不改变报告结论。
zh-CN.microcopy: 这是免费留存动作，不改变报告结论。

en.title: Send to email
en.body: Send the result to your email so you can return to it later.
en.do_not_overread: This is a free retention action and does not change the report result.
en.microcopy: This is a free retention action and does not change the report result.

zh-CN.title: 导出 PDF
zh-CN.body: 保存一份静态报告，用于个人复盘。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是免费留存动作，不改变报告结论。
zh-CN.microcopy: 这是免费留存动作，不改变报告结论。

en.title: Export PDF
en.body: Keep a static copy for your own reflection.
en.do_not_overread: This is a free retention action and does not change the report result.
en.microcopy: This is a free retention action and does not change the report result.

zh-CN.title: 生成分享卡
zh-CN.body: 分享你的情绪与关系模式，不展示敏感分数。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是免费留存动作，不改变报告结论。
zh-CN.microcopy: 这是免费留存动作，不改变报告结论。

en.title: Create share card
en.body: Share your emotional-relational pattern without showing sensitive scores.
en.do_not_overread: This is a free retention action and does not change the report result.
en.microcopy: This is a free retention action and does not change the report result.

zh-CN.title: 设置复测提醒
zh-CN.body: 在一段时间后重新测试，观察自我感知是否变化。
zh-CN.do_not_overread: 这是免费留存动作，不改变报告结论。
zh-CN.microcopy: 这是免费留存动作，不改变报告结论。

en.title: Set retest reminder
en.body: Retest later to see whether your self-perception has shifted.
en.do_not_overread: This is a free retention action and does not change the report result.
en.microcopy: This is a free retention action and does not change the report result.

zh-CN.title: 继续相关测试
zh-CN.body: 用其他测评补充工作方式、兴趣和人格背景。

en.microcopy: This is a free retention action and does not change the report result.
